title: ArtifactEnvelope
description: Lineage envelope wrapping ONE analysis or generation artifact in the global, persona-keyed store (STATE_DIR/store/{persona_id}/...). It records what produced the artifact — its chain (derived_from), the shared pattern it belongs to (pattern_tag = its peers), and which version of the shared logic stamped it (logic_version) — so a human review can ask 'why is this like this?', compare it to siblings, and tell what a logic change makes stale. See knowledge/reference/provenance-lineage.md.

key.description: Identity (persona + image/candidate) + provenance of where it came from (run). The run is provenance only — the identity is the ad or the candidate.

image_ref.description: analysis artifacts — the ad's stable image join key

run_id.description: the collection/generation run this came from (provenance, NOT the directory key)

pattern_tag.description: The shared pattern this item belongs to → its peers (same pattern_tag = made the same way). Analysis: "{ad_type}:{benefit}×{funnel}". Generation: the opportunity position. Used to compare an item against siblings to localize a fault.

derived_from.description: The chain — the parent envelopes this artifact was built from (machine-resolvable lineage). perception is a root (empty or [image]); copy/layout/visual/ad-type ← perception; intent ← copy+layout+visual+bindings; strategy ← ad-type+intent+visual+copy; ad-type-gate ← ad-type+the analyses.

ref.description: store-relative path of the parent envelope, e.g. "{persona}/{image_ref}/perception.json"

logic_version.description: Which version of the shared logic produced this. git sha of the plugin (method=git) or a content-hash of the logic dirs for a shipped non-git plugin (method=content). A change here marks prior artifacts in scope stale.

dirty.description: git only — uncommitted logic changes were present at stamp time

produced_by.description: the agent or script that emitted the payload

payload.description: the artifact itself — conforms to its own schemas/analysis|generation/*.schema.json
